semantic.judge: the plan declares real accessibility (keyboard operability + focus order, ARIA roles/labels, WCAG AA contrast, screen-reader announcements) for a UI surface that needs it (a form component + a modal dialog); the griller recognizes the declared a11y as PRESENT and emits zero findings; any doubt about the a11y's adequacy is raised as advisory prose, never as an absence finding, and no concern is manufactured.
